words.definition: lasting for a very short time
words.example: The ephemeral nature of social media trends.

words.definition: the belief that one's own thoughts and feelings are the only reality
words.example: He has a solipsistic view of the world.

words.definition: the tendency to see patterns in random data
words.example: I see faces in the clouds.

idioms.example: I just had to bite the bullet and finish the report.
I'm going to break a leg at the concert.
He finally came out of the closet as a gay man.
